name: restaurant-template
description: Restaurant menu template with Node.js backend

scripts.start:test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test PORT=3003 BASE_PATH=/resturant-website DB_FILE_PATH=.tmp/database.test.json node server.js
scripts.test:e2e: start-server-and-test "npm run start:test" http://localhost:3003/resturant-website/ "npm run cy:run"
